markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 20, 2026 11 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 84.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Tereza Martincova wins the Martincova vs Kraus professional tennis match in the 2026 WTA Bad Homburg Qualification Round 1 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Martincova vs Kraus professional tennis match in the 2026 WTA Bad Homburg Qualification Round 1 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Tereza Martincova win the Martincova vs Kraus: Qualification Round 1 match?
